text.title: ops-upselling-cross-selling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-upselling-cross-selling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLMs default to salesy, superlative-heavy tone in upsell copy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain with "no superlatives, no scarcity language, lead with the customer's specific data point." Review every draft for tone before sending. Salesy tone in product notifications reduces trust in the product itself.

failure-mode.description: Agent fabricates personalization when the data is not provided ("we saw you doubled your team!").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require the agent to quote the source field for every data point used. Fabricated personalization is worse than generic — it signals that the system is making things up and damages trust.

failure-mode.description: Agent sends price-change or upgrade emails autonomously.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pricing decisions require business owner sign-off. Auto-sent pricing emails create contractual and trust implications that cannot be undone.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates discount offers that exceed margin floor without rules-based constraints.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Codify discount caps in system rules (never more than X%), not prompts. LLMs will rationalize aggressive discounts to "close" hypothetical deals if discount logic is left to prompt reasoning.

failure-mode.description: Same trigger fires across email, in-app, and push notification to the same account on the same day.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Triple-channel simultaneous trigger reads as spam and creates negative brand association. Deduplicate by account-trigger-date with a minimum 72-hour window between channels for the same trigger.

failure-mode.description: Agent acts on stale CSV showing customer on Free tier after they already upgraded yesterday.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pull live subscription state from Stripe/Chargebee API immediately before generating any upsell copy. Sending an upgrade offer to a paying Pro customer is an embarrassing failure that inflates churn risk.
